src: Xbox Download Assistant (Xbox下载助手) — Supports download acceleration for Xbox, Microsoft Store, PlayStation, Nintendo Switch, EA App, Battle.net, Epic Games, Ubisoft Connect, Riot Games, and Rockstar Games, and fixes access issues for Steam Store & Community and GitHub.
ja: Xbox Download Assistant（Xbox下載助手）— Xbox、Microsoft Store、PlayStation、Nintendo Switch、EA App、Battle.net、Epic Games、Ubisoft Connect、Riot Games、Rockstar Gamesのダウンロード加速をサポートし、Steam Store＆コミュニティおよびGitHubのアクセス問題を解決する。
